---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or enhancement for Curated AI Digest
title: 'feat: '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / motivation

What problem does this solve? Who benefits (e.g. editors, subscribers, ops)?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to happen. If it touches a known seam, name it (a new `SourceProvider`, an
`EmailProvider`, a curation stage, a dashboard surface, the `@digest/radar` package, …).

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you weighed and why you'd skip them.

## Additional context

Mockups, links, the radar parallel, or related issues.
